mapper.insert:
insert into material_note(material_id, create_user, note_title, note_content, create_time, update_time) values
(#{note.materialId}, #{note.createUser}, #{note.noteTitle}, #{note.noteContent}, #{note.createTime}, #{note.updateTime})
mapper.select: select id, material_id, create_user, note_title, note_content, create_time, update_time from material_note where material_id = #{materialId} order by id
